scene.message: Scientist: Uhyahyahyahyahya!{waitkey}{clearbox}The hammer of judgment shall{nl} fall upon foolish mankind!{waitkey}Uhyahyahyahyahya!{waitkey}{ret}
Scientist: Mankind has no{nl} need of a future!!{waitkey}{ret}
Scientist: We must not crush{nl} mankind's future!{waitkey}Isn't that right, everyone!!{waitkey}{ret}
Scientist: What on earth was{nl} mankind even born for?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Are they all{nl} brainwashed?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Good thing those weird{nl} signals stopped.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: These guys have lost{nl} it.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Finally came to their{nl} senses, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We must stop Kandori{nl} as soon as we possibly can!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What were we born{nl} for...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30} hm.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey! Their eyes have{nl} gone all wild~!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Oh good~{waitkey}Everyone's eyes are back to{nl} normal.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Wa-wa-wa-wah!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Those signals are{nl} scary, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: There's no use staying{nl} here.{waitkey}Let's hurry on ahead.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
